item.name: Godsbed
item.description:
One should refrain from attempting to use this bivalve as a bed, since this tends to reduce its value in the eyes of potential buyers. If they find out about it, that is.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: The staggering size of these mollusks has fired the imagination of artists since the dawn of man. One particularly famous rendering has led to countless second-rate attempts to depict some muscled sea-god or scantily clad mermaid reclining upon the ocean's own bivalve bed.
